# Golden file: database.sqlite pack (E3)
# 9 cases: 2 destructive-high, 3 destructive-medium, 4 safe/edge
format: v1
---
# D1: DROP TABLE (High)
command: sqlite3 test.db "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-drop-table
---
# D2: .drop trigger (High)
command: sqlite3 test.db ".drop trigger update_timestamp"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-dot-drop
---
# D3: DELETE FROM without WHERE (Medium)
command: sqlite3 test.db "DELETE FROM users"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-delete-no-where
---
# D4: UPDATE without WHERE (Medium)
command: sqlite3 test.db "UPDATE config SET value='x'"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-update-no-where
---
# D5: TRUNCATE (Medium, ConfidenceLow — not valid SQLite SQL)
command: sqlite3 test.db "TRUNCATE TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Low
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-truncate
---
# S1: SELECT is safe
command: sqlite3 test.db "SELECT * FROM users"
decision: Allow
---
# S2: .tables is safe
command: sqlite3 test.db ".tables"
decision: Allow
---
# S3: interactive mode is safe
command: sqlite3 test.db
decision: Allow
---
# S4: DELETE with WHERE is safe
command: sqlite3 test.db "DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1"
decision: Allow
